'''鈭歠-zh-p''' ('''kafazhap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:percieve|percieve]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-zh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:percieve|percieve]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-zh-p
|-
! Lemma
| kafazhap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifazhap|thifazhap]] || [[word:jifazhap|jifazhap]] || [[word:shifazhap|shifazhap]] || [[word:kifazhap|kifazhap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufazhap|thuthufazhap]] || [[word:jujufazhap|jujufazhap]] || [[word:shushufazhap|shushufazhap]] || [[word:kukufazhap|kukufazhap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufazhap|thufazhap]] || [[word:jufazhap|jufazhap]] || [[word:shufazhap|shufazhap]] || [[word:kufazhap|kufazhap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufazhap|thufazhap]] || [[word:jufazhap|jufazhap]] || [[word:shufazhap|shufazhap]] || [[word:kufazhap|kufazhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefazhap|thefazhap]] || [[word:jefazhap|jefazhap]] || [[word:shefazhap|shefazhap]] || [[word:kefazhap|kefazhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofazhap|thothofazhap]] || [[word:jojofazhap|jojofazhap]] || [[word:shoshofazhap|shoshofazhap]] || [[word:kokofazhap|kokofazhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofazhap|thofazhap]] || [[word:jofazhap|jofazhap]] || [[word:shofazhap|shofazhap]] || [[word:kofazhap|kofazhap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofazhap|thofazhap]] || [[word:jofazhap|jofazhap]] || [[word:shofazhap|shofazhap]] || [[word:kofazhap|kofazhap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fazhap|fazhap]] || [[word:fazhap|fazhap]] || [[word:fazhap|fazhap]] || [[word:fazhap|fazhap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fazhap|fazhap]] || [[word:fazhap|fazhap]] || [[word:fazhap|fazhap]] || [[word:fazhap|fazhap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fazhap|fazhap]] || [[word:fazhap|fazhap]] || [[word:fazhap|fazhap]] || [[word:fazhap|fazhap]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fazhap|fazhap]] || [[word:fazhap|fazhap]] || [[word:fazhap|fazhap]] || [[word:fazhap|fazhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fazhap|th忙fazhap]] || [[word:j忙fazhap|j忙fazhap]] || [[word:sh忙fazhap|sh忙fazhap]] || [[word:k忙fazhap|k忙fazhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafazhap|thathafazhap]] || [[word:jajafazhap|jajafazhap]] || [[word:shashafazhap|shashafazhap]] || [[word:kakafazhap|kakafazhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafazhap|thafazhap]] || [[word:jafazhap|jafazhap]] || [[word:shafazhap|shafazhap]] || [[word:kafazhap|kafazhap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafazhap|thafazhap]] || [[word:jafazhap|jafazhap]] || [[word:shafazhap|shafazhap]] || [[word:kafazhap|kafazhap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafazhap|shafazhap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafazhap|goshafazhap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafazhap|gokishafazhap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafazhapn眉|shafazhapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafazhapnkn眉|goshafazhapnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafazhapn眉|gokishafazhapn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafazhapsh毛|shafazhapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafazhapnksh毛|goshafazhapnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafazhapsh毛|gokishafazhapsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafazhapro|shafazhapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafazhapnkro|goshafazhapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafazhapro|gokishafazhapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafazhapmu|shafazhapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafazhapnkmu|goshafazhapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafazhapmu|gokishafazhapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafazhapsher|shafazhapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafazhapnksher|goshafazhapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafazhapsher|gokishafazhapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafazhapng|shafazhapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafazhapnkng|goshafazhapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafazhapng|gokishafazhapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafazhapya|shafazhapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafazhapnkya|goshafazhapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafazhapya|gokishafazhapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafazhapyam|shafazhapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafazhapnkyam|goshafazhapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafazhapyam|gokishafazhapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafazhapn眉sh毛|shafazhapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafazhapnkn眉sh毛|goshafazhapnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafazhapn眉sh毛|gokishafazhapn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafazhapn眉ro|shafazhapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafazhapnkn眉ro|goshafazhapnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafazhapn眉ro|gokishafazhapn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafazhapn眉mu|shafazhapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafazhapnkn眉mu|goshafazhapnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafazhapn眉mu|gokishafazhapn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafazhapsh毛n眉|shafazhapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafazhapnksh毛n眉|goshafazhapnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafazhapsh毛n眉|gokishafazhapsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafazhapsh毛ro|shafazhapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafazhapnksh毛ro|goshafazhapnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafazhapsh毛ro|gokishafazhapsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafazhapsh毛mu|shafazhapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafazhapnksh毛mu|goshafazhapnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafazhapsh毛mu|gokishafazhapsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafazhapron眉|shafazhapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafazhapnkron眉|goshafazhapnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafazhapron眉|gokishafazhapron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafazhaprosh毛|shafazhaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafazhapnkrosh毛|goshafazhapnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafazhaprosh毛|gokishafazhaprosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafazhapromu|shafazhapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafazhapnkromu|goshafazhapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafazhapromu|gokishafazhapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafazhapmun眉|shafazhapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafazhapnkmun眉|goshafazhapnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafazhapmun眉|gokishafazhapmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafazhapmush毛|shafazhapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafazhapnkmush毛|goshafazhapnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafazhapmush毛|gokishafazhapmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafazhapmuro|shafazhapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafazhapnkmuro|goshafazhapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafazhapmuro|gokishafazhapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
